steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main idea of the whole passage. The final sentence is the thesis: Villasana sees both her approaches — celebrating cultural icons and honoring ordinary people — as ways of depicting human power and interconnectedness.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'began with famous people, then transitioned to everyday people': the passage describes two simultaneous approaches, not a career progression. ✗
  • Choice B — 'recognizing both famous and everyday examples of human strength and connection': directly matches the thesis. ✓
  • Choice C — 'tortilla portrait focuses more on connection than resilience': the passage makes no such distinction between the two works. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Ali depiction receives more scholarly attention': comparative attention from scholars is never mentioned. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
